idea-plugin.name: Claude Symbol Linker (spike)
idea-plugin.description: Spike build: registers a consoleFilterProvider that linkifies identifier-shaped tokens in terminal/console output, to test whether a third-party filter fires in Rider's reworked terminal and whether clicking can drive navigation.

action.text: Refresh C# Symbols for Claude Links
action.description: Reload the C# symbol index so newly added or renamed symbols become clickable in later terminal output.
